use_cases: Video playback controls on media streaming platforms
Expandable play button for video-first applications and landing pages
Interactive button that morphs to reveal additional controls on click
Sleek play button interface for premium SaaS product demos
Animated button component for mobile and desktop media applications
ai_summary: A morphing Apple-style play button component that animates from a compact 60px circle to an expanded 330px pill shape when clicked. Built with Framer Motion for smooth spring animations and layout transitions, featuring a minimalist design with subtle opacity and scale effects. Ideal for media platforms, streaming services, and premium SaaS applications requiring elegant interactive controls.
